steps.title: Mark the substitution
steps.content: The first sentence says scientists should avoid using one term. The next sentence says researchers should use a different term in its place. The transition needs to mark replacement, not time, place, or concession.

steps.title: Reject wrong signals
steps.content: A signals an earlier time. B signals concession despite a prior point. C points to a location and does not connect the ideas. The answer is D.
